name: Lumen Drift
tagline: An original Game Boy Advance game — finished, publish-safe, 100% original assets.
description: A finished homebrew GBA ROM (v1.3) built entirely from original assets. Download the ROM and load it into any GBA emulator to play.
status_note: Downloadable now — the lumen-drift-v1.3 GitHub Release is published; the Download button fetches the ROM (lumen-drift.gba) directly from that release.

controls.action: Start a run (and restart after game over)
Pause / resume — the whole cave freezes, surge included

changelog.note: The echoes deepen — every full echo cycle, crystals come more often and the galleries tighten.
Graze mechanic — slip past a crystal close enough to hear the whisper and part of your light comes back.
Pause and mute added; the mote flashes hot the instant a graze pays.

name: Gloamline
tagline: An original Nintendo DS survival game — hold a moor hamlet against the walking dead, night after night.
description: A finished homebrew Nintendo DS ROM built entirely from original assets. You are the last lamplighter of a fenced hamlet: kite the shambling dead, place and repair barricades, and survive each night. Download the .nds ROM and load it into melonDS or DeSmuME to play.
status_note: Downloadable now — the committed dist/gloamline.nds ROM (118 KB) fetches directly from the gba-homebrew repo; load it in melonDS or DeSmuME. No published GitHub Release yet, so the Download button points at the committed ROM.

controls.action: Shove the nearest Shambler in reach
Barricade: place at your feet — or repair the one in reach
Chalk mark on the watch-map at your position — X again wipes it
Scavenge the yard before next night
Tap the watch-map to drop or move the mark

name: mineverse
tagline: A staged web mining-world game — the fleet's games flagship.
description: A staged web game with stages 0, a, b and c complete. It now serves live as a read-only view over the superbot mining economy; player sign-in is launching next.

changelog.note: Walking skeleton: sample snapshot → stdlib server → static frontend (PR #2).
Read contract v1: versioned mining data contract, bot-side projection (PR #7).
Write contract v1 — test-guild only, via the bot's audited action endpoint (PR #13).
Live-prod prep, owner-flag-gated (prepared; cutover checklist included).

name: games-web
tagline: A zero-dependency web app: an RPG mining character sheet in the browser.
description: A zero-dependency web app showing an RPG mining character sheet, deployed live to GitHub Pages. Open it in the browser and switch between sample characters.
status_note: Live on GitHub Pages — a phase-1 character sheet rendered over mock data.
controls: Topbar character switcher — flips between the two mock characters (Durzo Coalfist, Pip Gravelton) without a reload
Hover a gear chip to see its stats in a tooltip
Keyboard focus ring on gear chips; a live region announces each character switch

changelog.note: Phase 1 — mock-data mining character sheet (Durzo, Pip).
Validation tightened: stats requires at least one entry (minItems: 1); effective contract unchanged (patch bump).
